    /// <inheritdoc />
    [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
    public override global::TestApp.Models.Result<global::TestApp.Models.PersonModel>? Map(global::TestApp.Models.Person? source)
    {
        if (source is null)
            return default;

        return new global::TestApp.Models.Result<global::TestApp.Models.PersonModel>
        {
            Id = source.Id,
            Name = source.FirstName,
            IsActive = source.IsActive,
        };
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
    public override void Map(global::TestApp.Models.Person source, global::TestApp.Models.Result<global::TestApp.Models.PersonModel> destination)
    {
        if (source is null)
            throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(source));

        if (destination is null)
            throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(destination));

        destination.Id = source.Id;
        destination.Name = source.FirstName;
        destination.IsActive = source.IsActive;
    }

    private static readonly System.Linq.Expressions.Expression<Func<global::TestApp.Models.Person, global::TestApp.Models.Result<global::TestApp.Models.PersonModel>>> _projectExpression =
        src => new global::TestApp.Models.Result<global::TestApp.Models.PersonModel>
        {
            Id = src.Id,
            Name = src.FirstName,
            IsActive = src.IsActive,

    /// <inheritdoc />
    public override IQueryable<global::TestApp.Models.Result<global::TestApp.Models.PersonModel>> ProjectTo(IQueryable<global::TestApp.Models.Person> source)
    {
        if (source is null)
            throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(source));

        return source.Select(_projectExpression);
